title: Skeleton Control Board
subtitle: Synthetic public-safe operating snapshot for read-only local review. No live services, private data, or mutation adapters are represented.

today.title: Review synthetic control board fixture
today.detail: Confirm the public-safe snapshot matches the MVP sections and field-length bounds.

today.title: Prepare local validation evidence
today.detail: Run schema parity, read-only route, responsive markup, and deployment configuration checks.

today.title: Document Tailscale Serve handoff
today.detail: Capture operator-only notes without changing Tailscale state or exposing a public hostname.

kanban.title: Snapshot contracts
kanban.detail: Typed Python contracts mirror the JSON Schema for the synthetic fixture.

kanban.title: Server-rendered dashboard
kanban.detail: FastAPI and Jinja2 render a responsive read-only board from local fixture data.

kanban.title: Deployment notes
kanban.detail: Compose binds to localhost only and includes a single application container health check.

kanban.title: Mutation adapters
kanban.detail: No write routes or live integration adapters are included in this MVP.

workflows.name: Control board build

evidence.label: Schema parity
evidence.reference: tests/test_control_board_contracts.py validates fixture against schema and contract model.

evidence.label: UI safety
evidence.reference: tests/test_control_board_ui.py checks escaping, sections, static assets, and mobile viewport metadata.

evidence.label: Deployment boundary
evidence.reference: tests/test_control_board_deployment.py checks localhost-only Compose and single app health check.

health.detail: FastAPI app exposes read-only GET routes.
CSS and JavaScript are local package files.
No GitHub, Runner, MemoryGateway, n8n, Calendar, Gmail, or network adapters are connected.
